theme: The real ROI of incentive travel — numbers HR directors need

linkedin.text:
A ₪200,000 incentive trip that prevents 2 resignations has already paid for itself. Everything after that is profit.

That's the slide that ends the CFO debate. The numbers behind it, from our client data:
→ +22% sales the year after a structured incentive program
→ 96% of participants report better team cohesion
→ Near-zero turnover among participants for 12 months
→ Replacing one mid-level employee: ₪80,000–150,000
→ An incentive trip: ₪6,000–9,000 per person

The ROI nobody puts in the deck: stronger employer brand, higher leadership-trust scores, a post-trip productivity spike, and stories that circulate internally for years.

The question isn't "can we afford it?" It's "can we afford to lose the people who earned it?"

📅 Comment 'GUIDE' for the CFO-ready ROI model for your industry.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeEngagement #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership #EmployeeRetention
